description_long: This object depicts a humanoid figure with exaggerated, elongated limbs and distorted proportions, giving it a surreal and unsettling appearance. The figure has long, thin arms that stretch outward far beyond normal human anatomy, with sharp, angular bends and pointed extremities. The torso and legs are also elongated and twisted, with the legs bent at unnatural angles and the feet appearing pointed. The head is relatively small compared to the rest of the body, with long hair flowing down the back. The figure appears to be wearing a form-fitting outfit, possibly a dress or bodysuit, and has visible boots or high footwear. The overall form is highly stylized and abstract, suggesting a fantastical or nightmarish interpretation of a pedestrian adult.
description: A surreal humanoid figure with extremely elongated limbs, twisted posture, and a form-fitting outfit with boots. The figure's proportions are highly exaggerated and abstract.
description_view_0: The front view shows the figure's face, chest, and the dramatic forward extension of the arms and legs.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the extreme length and angularity of the arms and the bent legs.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the back of the head, flowing hair, and the outstretched arms extending behind the figure.
description_view_3: The right side view emphasizes the twisted torso and the sharp, pointed extension of the limbs.
attribute_posture: twisted, contorted stance with arms and legs extended
